data.title: Microservices Structure
data.description: Adobe operates on a microservices architecture, allowing for independent deployment and scaling of services.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Adobe utilizes cloud services for resilient operations and storage.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: The site uses load balancing to ensure uptime and handle traffic peaks.

data.title: CDN Utilization
data.description: Content Delivery Network is used to enhance performance and reduce latency.

data.title: Monolithic Legacy Components
data.description: Some legacy systems still remain in a monolithic form.
